_doc: Per-engine operational state. Updated by cspm-orchestrator and sprint_runner.py after each sprint. Different from MEMORY.md (episodic) — this is current operational snapshot.

fields.image_tag: currently deployed image tag on EKS
fields.db_name: PostgreSQL DB name for this engine
fields.last_scan_run_id: UUID of last successful scan run (null if unknown)
fields.pending_work: array of story_ids or task descriptions not yet started
fields.notes: array of free-text notes about current state
